executives.name: Brad Smith
executives.background: President of Marshall University and former Chairman and CEO of Intuit Inc.

executives.name: Forrest Norrod
executives.background: Mr. Norrod is AMD’s Executive Vice President and General Manager, Data Center Solutions Business Group. He joined AMD in 2014. Previously, he was Vice President and General Manager of Dell’s server business.

executives.name: John Doerr
executives.background: L. John Doerr has been a director since 1999. He is the Chairman of Kleiner Perkins, a venture capital firm.

executives.name: Kiran Patel
executives.background: Kiran Patel was formerly the Executive Vice President and General Manager of the Small Business Group at Intuit Inc.

executives.name: Stratton Sclavos
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of VeriSign, Inc. He is a seasoned executive with experience in cybersecurity and technology infrastructure.
